name: SEO Overview
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The higher ranked on the search results page your website is, and more frequently your site appears in the search results and the more visitors it will receive."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To begin with, start by verifying your website with "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/426-google-search-console-setup", "children": [{"text": "Google Search Console"}]}, {"text": " and installing "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1254-google-analytics-4", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics"}]}, {"text": " to review and analyse traffic."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From here, we recommend investing time into generating original content through blogs, product descriptions and information pages.\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "While\u00a0Neto by Maropost does not provide SEO services directly, we do align ourselves with a number of "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/partner-directory-list", "children": [{"text": "SEO agencies"}]}, {"text": " to deliver a complete service to its clients. It is important to continually invest in SEO as part of your marketing strategy."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Why Should You Invest In SEO?"}], "data-id": "why-should-you-invest-in-seo"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "High ROI - An effective SEO campaign can bring a higher return on your investment than any other type of marketing for your company. SEO can increase your volume of sales and overall profitability."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Long Term Results - Once a website obtains position through a SEO campaign, it should retain the position long term, as opposed to Pay per Click (PPC). SEO is a cheaper, and longer term solution than any other search engine marketing strategy."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Cost-effective - One of the great benefits of search engine optimisation is that it is cost effective and requires only a minimum amount of capital to achieve maximum exposure of your website."}]}]}]}]
